node.excerpt:
The Border  is the last in the  Power of the Dog  trilogy. Maybe not as good as the
others, but it was great to have an ending and was good…
The Committed  is the sequel to  The Sympathizer . Both are very good.

frontmatter.title: The WEIRDest People in the World

node.excerpt:
The WEIRDest People in the World  was a really great book. I don't have much of a
review to write at the moment, but I highly recommend it.

I listen to the A16Z podcasts and one of them is One on One with A and Z which is pretty good. I
think it is just recording a Clubhouse show…

Managing Humans  was a recommendation from someone at work. It is basically a
collection of blog posts turned into a book. That does not…
